'''âj-zh-r''' ('''kajazhar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:coalize|coalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-zh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coalize|coalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-zh-r
|-
! Lemma
| kajazhar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijazhar|thijazhar]] || [[word:jijazhar|jijazhar]] || [[word:shijazhar|shijazhar]] || [[word:kijazhar|kijazhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujazhar|thuthujazhar]] || [[word:jujujazhar|jujujazhar]] || [[word:shushujazhar|shushujazhar]] || [[word:kukujazhar|kukujazhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujazhar|thujazhar]] || [[word:jujazhar|jujazhar]] || [[word:shujazhar|shujazhar]] || [[word:kujazhar|kujazhar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujazhar|thujazhar]] || [[word:jujazhar|jujazhar]] || [[word:shujazhar|shujazhar]] || [[word:kujazhar|kujazhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejazhar|thejazhar]] || [[word:jejazhar|jejazhar]] || [[word:shejazhar|shejazhar]] || [[word:kejazhar|kejazhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojazhar|thothojazhar]] || [[word:jojojazhar|jojojazhar]] || [[word:shoshojazhar|shoshojazhar]] || [[word:kokojazhar|kokojazhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojazhar|thojazhar]] || [[word:jojazhar|jojazhar]] || [[word:shojazhar|shojazhar]] || [[word:kojazhar|kojazhar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojazhar|thojazhar]] || [[word:jojazhar|jojazhar]] || [[word:shojazhar|shojazhar]] || [[word:kojazhar|kojazhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjazhar|thĂŠjazhar]] || [[word:jĂŠjazhar|jĂŠjazhar]] || [[word:shĂŠjazhar|shĂŠjazhar]] || [[word:kĂŠjazhar|kĂŠjazhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajazhar|thathajazhar]] || [[word:jajajazhar|jajajazhar]] || [[word:shashajazhar|shashajazhar]] || [[word:kakajazhar|kakajazhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajazhar|thajazhar]] || [[word:jajazhar|jajazhar]] || [[word:shajazhar|shajazhar]] || [[word:kajazhar|kajazhar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajazhar|thajazhar]] || [[word:jajazhar|jajazhar]] || [[word:shajazhar|shajazhar]] || [[word:kajazhar|kajazhar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajazhar|shajazhar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajazhar|goshajazhar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajazhar|gokishajazhar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajazharnĂŒ|shajazharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajazharnknĂŒ|goshajazharnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazharnĂŒ|gokishajazharnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajazharshĂ«|shajazharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajazharnkshĂ«|goshajazharnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajazharshĂ«|gokishajazharshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazharo|shajazharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazharnkro|goshajazharnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazharo|gokishajazharo]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazharmu|shajazharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazharnkmu|goshajazharnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazharmu|gokishajazharmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajazharsher|shajazharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajazharnksher|goshajazharnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajazharsher|gokishajazharsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajazharng|shajazharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajazharnkng|goshajazharnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajazharng|gokishajazharng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajazharya|shajazharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajazharnkya|goshajazharnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajazharya|gokishajazharya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajazharyam|shajazharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajazharnkyam|goshajazharnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajazharyam|gokishajazharyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazharnĂŒshĂ«|shajazharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazharnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajazharnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazharnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajazharnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazharnĂŒro|shajazharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazharnknĂŒro|goshajazharnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazharnĂŒro|gokishajazharnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazharnĂŒmu|shajazharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazharnknĂŒmu|goshajazharnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazharnĂŒmu|gokishajazharnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazharshĂ«nĂŒ|shajazharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazharnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajazharnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazharshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajazharshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazharshĂ«ro|shajazharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazharnkshĂ«ro|goshajazharnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazharshĂ«ro|gokishajazharshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazharshĂ«mu|shajazharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazharnkshĂ«mu|goshajazharnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazharshĂ«mu|gokishajazharshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazharonĂŒ|shajazharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazharnkronĂŒ|goshajazharnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazharonĂŒ|gokishajazharonĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazharoshĂ«|shajazharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazharnkroshĂ«|goshajazharnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazharoshĂ«|gokishajazharoshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazharomu|shajazharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazharnkromu|goshajazharnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazharomu|gokishajazharomu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazharmunĂŒ|shajazharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazharnkmunĂŒ|goshajazharnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazharmunĂŒ|gokishajazharmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazharmushĂ«|shajazharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazharnkmushĂ«|goshajazharnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazharmushĂ«|gokishajazharmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazharmuro|shajazharmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazharnkmuro|goshajazharnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazharmuro|gokishajazharmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
